---
title: "test_model_averaging"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`test/test_model_averaging.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_model_averaging.py)
:::


## API Reference

#### `test_get_IC_AIC` {#test_get_ic_aic}

```python
def test_get_IC_AIC()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_model_averaging.py#L11){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_get_weights_sum_positive` {#test_get_weights_sum_positive}

```python
def test_get_weights_sum_positive()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_model_averaging.py#L23){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_get_weights_AICc_vs_AIC` {#test_get_weights_aicc_vs_aic}

```python
def test_get_weights_AICc_vs_AIC()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_model_averaging.py#L34){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_with_CDF_get_quantiles` {#test_with_cdf_get_quantiles}

```python
def test_with_CDF_get_quantiles()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/test_model_averaging.py#L46){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
